concerns.text: The 'Against the Others!' dataset is cited with a placeholder URL 'https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.12345' and explicitly marked as an 'Example placeholder'. The plan relies on this dataset for FR-001/FR-002 to filter specific topics (climate, immigration) and outrage labels. A placeholder URL is not a real, accessible source; the pipeline cannot run or validate data availability until a verified, reachable URL and accession ID are provided. This blocks the 'Verified Accuracy' gate and the entire data ingestion phase.

The plan assumes the 'Against the Others!' dataset contains specific metadata fields ('outrage_label', 'topic') and specific topic values ('climate', 'immigration'). The 'Critical Note on Dataset Fit' admits this is unverified. If the actual dataset (once the URL is fixed) lacks these specific fields or topics, the plan's core logic (FR-002) fails. The plan must cite a specific, verified dataset version that is confirmed to contain these exact schema elements before proceeding.
